title: tidb panic when execute insert statements.
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)


```sql
create table t (id int key, k int,c int);
alter table t add index idx(k) global;
insert into t values (1,1,1); -- this will panic
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, salary DECIMAL(10,2));
INSERT INTO t1 (name, age, salary) VALUES ('Alice', 30, 50000.00);
CREATE TABLE t2 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, t1_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (t1_id) REFERENCES t1(id));
key_bug_features: insert statement causes panic due to nil pointer dereference
